

## Ten optional bounded agents

All ten install `PERM-P0 Disabled` with no credentials, tools, memory, network, destinations, schedules, recursion, hidden state or background execution. A maximum is only an upper bound a separately authorized expiring one-run evaluation may request.

| Agent | Exact name | Bounded purpose | Installed state | Maximum after separate authorization |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `AGT-01` | Opportunity & Evidence Scout | Searches an approved public/authoritative source allowlist and drafts a TRACE evidence landscape with source versions and limits. | PERM-P0 Disabled | PERM-P2 approved read-only source sandbox; no paywall bypass, scraping identities, conclusions, or publication. |
| `AGT-02` | Boundary & Governance Questioner | Applies FRAME to approved metadata and prepares questions/routes for HRO/IRB, QI, clinical, privacy, security, regulatory and legal owners. | PERM-P0 Disabled | PERM-P2 approved read-only sandbox; never determines status or submits. |
| `AGT-03` | Study Concept & Design Drafting Assistant | Creates non-authoritative study concept and design-option drafts from approved, non-person-level inputs. | PERM-P0 Disabled | PERM-P2 approved read-only sandbox; no protocol approval, sample-size authority, eligibility, or launch. |
| `AGT-04` | Methods, Measures & Reproducibility Reviewer | Checks definitions, denominators, provenance, pre-specification, bias threats, consistency, corrections and reproducibility questions. | PERM-P0 Disabled | PERM-P3 institution-approved aggregate/enclave-export sandbox; no row-level analysis or statistical sign-off. |
| `AGT-05` | Participant Burden, Accessibility & Equity Reviewer | Reviews approved plans for burden, exclusion, access, language, digital divide, missing voices, compensation questions and feedback-back. | PERM-P0 Disabled | PERM-P2 approved read-only sandbox; no protected-class inference, certification, recruitment, consent or individual scoring. |
| `AGT-06` | Portfolio, Funding & Dependency Orchestrator | Builds aggregate portfolio scenarios, milestone/dependency maps, readiness gaps and decision briefs. | PERM-P0 Disabled | PERM-P2 approved metadata sandbox; no task assignment, funding submission, resource decision or official-system write. |
| `AGT-07` | Innovation Experiment & Translation Planner | Uses PROBE to draft non-production experiments, evidence thresholds, translation/scale questions, stop and rollback plans. | PERM-P0 Disabled | PERM-P3 institution-approved synthetic sandbox; no production/patient-facing deployment, procurement or scale action. |
| `AGT-08` | Implementation, Value & Learning Analyst | Builds traceable aggregate implementation/value/equity scenarios and balancing-measure questions. | PERM-P0 Disabled | PERM-P3 approved aggregate/enclave-export sandbox; no care/workforce change, financial conclusion or causal overclaim. |
| `AGT-09` | Human-Voice Dissemination & Integrity Assistant | Drafts source-annotated plain-language options, limitations, disclosure and accessibility questions and applies anti-slop checks. | PERM-P0 Disabled | PERM-P2 approved read-only sandbox; no authorship decision, ghostwriting, confidential disclosure, external send or publication. |
| `AGT-10` | Independent Agent Auditor & Kill Sentinel | Evaluates frozen agent versions against canonical positive/negative fixtures and prepares violation, kill, rollback, purge and retirement evidence. | PERM-P0 Disabled | PERM-P2 separate control-plane read-only; no approval power and no ability to modify the agent under test or its receipts. |

Every one-run token freezes run/agent/model/prompt/policy/schema/input/output hashes, allowed data/source/tool/destination/network, one invocation, zero retries by default, time/cost/input/output caps, expected zero external action/data delta, human checkpoints, expiry, kill acknowledgment and final reconciliation. Any mismatch returns `AGENT_RUN_BLOCKED_HASH_OR_AUTHORITY_MISMATCH`. The auditor cannot modify the tested agent or its receipts.
